title: lotononis quinata
intro: Lotononis quinata, also known as the hairy milkwort or Quinquefolia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Lotononis quinata lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lotononis quinata are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lotononis quinata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
